emails.subject: Exodus NDA
emails.body: Tana, It appears that the Exodus NDA was done out of the Portland office and we don't have access to their directories. It does look like our form, so you can probably use it as your starting point. We, at EBS, are sorry for this inconvenience. Marie Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net
